caption.full:
Seth Green wants to play Mordecai in Dungeon Crawler Carl

Seth Green is publicly campaigning for the role of Mordecai in the upcoming live-action Dungeon Crawler Carl series. He posted fan art of the character on Instagram, tagging author Matt Dinniman and producer Seth MacFarlane. Green stated that a strong fan movement would be the most convincing way to secure the part.

Send this to a Dungeon Crawler Carl fan who would love to see Seth Green as Mordecai!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#DungeonCrawlerCarl #SethGreen #CastingWatch #PeacockTV

youtube.title: Seth Green Wants Dungeon Crawler Carl Role
youtube.description:
Seth Green is campaigning for the role of Mordecai in the live-action Dungeon Crawler Carl series on Peacock. He posted fan art and stated, "Really, the only thing that could be convincing is like a thick fan movement where people agree collectively that I could play that part." No casting has been announced yet for the show, produced by Matt Dinniman and Seth MacFarlane.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/tv/seth-green-wants-to-join-the-dungeon-crawler-carl-live-action-series-as/
